lex.bot.customvocabularyitem.CfnAbout: Specifies an entry in a custom vocabulary.

lex.bot.customvocabularyitem.Phrase.Description: Specifies 1 - 4 words that should be recognized.

lex.bot.customvocabularyitem.Weight.Description: Specifies the degree to which the phrase recognition is boosted. The default value is 1.
